rationale: QA Engineer with only 2 years at fictional company Pied Piper (honeypot signal), no embedding/retrieval/ranking experience, and AI exposure limited to self-learner side projects.

Frontend Engineer with 4 years focused on test automation and UI work at Hooli and fictional Initech; skills (MLflow, Apache Beam) are data-pipeline adjacent but there is no embedding, retrieval, or ranking systems experience.

Graphic Designer/marketing-manager profile at fictional Initech with skills in Marketing and Tally; no engineering or ML depth whatsoever, making this a non-technical profile entirely misaligned with the role.

HR Manager for 4.5 years (Infosys + Globex) whose described work is demand-generation marketing and mechanical engineering design, with no ML, IR, or software engineering substance despite tier_1 education at IIIT Bangalore.

8+ years entirely at TCS and Infosys (IT services only) in Java/Android and Cloud DevOps roles with no ML or information retrieval work, disqualifying under the JD's explicit consulting-only exclusion.

7 years entirely at IT-services firms HCL and Capgemini in DevOps/frontend roles; while RAG appears in skills (29 months intermediate), the entire career at consulting-only companies with no product-company ML deployment is a hard disqualifier per the JD.

Marketing Manager with only 1.8 years at Infosys doing demand-generation/SEO work; the advanced MLOps skill claim (59 months) is implausible keyword inflation for a pure marketing role with zero engineering background.

Frontend/Java Developer with 3.7 years split between Hooli and fictional Wayne Enterprises; LoRA listed as a skill but the actual work history is mobile/Android development with no retrieval or ranking systems experience.

Cloud Engineer with 2.6 years at Razorpay (product company, positive signal) but skills and work are in OpenCV, image classification, and speech recognition rather than NLP/IR — the JD explicitly flags CV/speech backgrounds without NLP as a poor fit.

9.4 years as a .NET Developer with Milvus listed as a skill (19 months) and some product-company exposure at Razorpay, but the primary stint is at Cognizant (IT services) and two roles are at fictional Wayne Enterprises and Hooli, with no demonstrated IR/ranking system ownership.
